sql_array: CREATE TABLE tbl1 (u UNION(num INTEGER, str VARCHAR));
INSERT INTO tbl1 VALUES (union_value(num := 1)), (union_value(str := 'two')), (union_value(str := 'three')) NOT NULL;
UPDATE tbl1 SET u = union_value(str := 'updated_value') WHERE union_tag(u) = 'str';
SELECT u, union_tag(u) AS tag FROM tbl1 WHERE union_extract(u, 'num') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT union_extract(u, 'str') AS value FROM tbl1 WHERE union_tag(u) = 'str';
